Video.summary: In this US Open semifinal showdown, top seeds Kyle Yates and Andrei Daescu face off against the dynamic duo of Austin Gridley and Mario Barrientos. With strategic finesse and explosive play, both teams battle for a spot in the final. A must-watch clash of styles and strengths on Championship Court.
Video.title: US Open 2023 – Men’s Pro Doubles Semifinal – Yates & Daescu vs Gridley & Barrientos

Image.alt: US Open 2023 – Men’s Pro Doubles Semifinal – Yates & Daescu vs Gridley & Barrientos
US Open 2023 – Men’s Pro Doubles Semifinal – Yates & Daescu vs Gridley & Barrientos
US Open 2023 – Men’s Pro Doubles Semifinal – Yates & Daescu vs Gridley & Barrientos

Video.summary: December 12, 2023 - Welcome to the second round of the semi-finals for season 2 of The Arizona Pickleball League! It's Tuesday Night Pickleball @ The Orchard, and the Gilbert Gladiators face-off against the Scottsdale Scorchers.
Video.title: December 12, 2023 - AZ PBL

Image.alt: December 12, 2023 - AZ PBL
December 12, 2023 - AZ PBL
December 12, 2023 - AZ PBL

Video.summary: This Men's Senior Pro Doubles match from the US Open 2025 features the team of Schiller and Weinbach battling Bronson and Coker. The commentary captures crucial moments, strategic missteps, and the competitive flow between these seasoned players, ultimately leading to a clear win for Schiller and Weinbach.
Video.title: US Open 2025 - Men's Senior Pro Doubles - Schiller/Weinbach vs. Bronson/Coker

Image.alt: US Open 2025 - Men's Senior Pro Doubles - Schiller/Weinbach vs. Bronson/Coker
US Open 2025 - Men's Senior Pro Doubles - Schiller/Weinbach vs. Bronson/Coker
US Open 2025 - Men's Senior Pro Doubles - Schiller/Weinbach vs. Bronson/Coker

Video.summary: Molly Carter and Kim Kesner take on Pam Ruoff and Erica Marsh in this Women's Senior Pro Bronze Medal Match.

Image.alt: US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - Women's Senior Pro Doubles - Bronze Medal Match
US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - Women's Senior Pro Doubles - Bronze Medal Match
US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - Women's Senior Pro Doubles - Bronze Medal Match

Video.summary: It's the moment of truth! Championship Sunday has arrived for the World Pickleball League (WPBL) as the Bengaluru Jawans take on Pune United for the title. Prepare yourself for an intense matchup -from Men's Singles right through to Mixed Doubles!
Video.title: WPBL 2025 - Bengaluru vs. Pune - Finals

Image.alt: WPBL 2025 - Bengaluru vs. Pune - Finals
WPBL 2025 - Bengaluru vs. Pune - Finals
WPBL 2025 - Bengaluru vs. Pune - Finals

Video.summary: We are live in sunny San Diego for Week 3 of the NCPA San Diego Regional 2025. This high-stakes collegiate team match features the University of San Diego (USD) battling Grand Canyon University (GCU) in a best-of-seven series.The action includes intense Men's Doubles , Women's Singles , and Mixed Doubles as these teams compete for regional dominance. Watch top talent, including GCU's lefty powerhouse Adam Jones, who boasts a strong 5.6 singles rating , and his partner Xavier Cook Nakakuki. On the USD side, the episode highlights the partnership of Marcus Hopkins and Ryan, an impressive grad student player with high doubles ratings. USD’s Bella also shows grit in the women's singles match. This broadcast captures the best of college pickleball in an amazing format.
Video.title: NCPA San Diego Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - USD vs. GCU

Image.alt: NCPA San Diego Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - USD vs. GCU
NCPA San Diego Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - USD vs. GCU
NCPA San Diego Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - USD vs. GCU

Video.summary: Live from The Picklr in Noblesville, this NCPA Indiana Regional 2025 matchup features a critical battle between the University of Wisconsin-Madison and Purdue University. With eight national bids and $5,000 in prize money on the line, the stakes are high as the 16th-seeded Purdue takes on the 17th-seeded Wisconsin in a best-of-seven format.The match kicks off with Gender Doubles, where Wisconsin’s duo of Noah and Sarah Sowinski showcase dominant net play and quick hands against Purdue’s Caleb Yang and Trevor Ju. Watch for standout moments, including an incredible Ernie from Wisconsin and strategic adjustments in the Mixed Doubles games involving Colton Thielman and Elena Schlichte.
Video.title: NCPA Indiana Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - Wisconsin vs. Purdue

Image.alt: NCPA Indiana Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - Wisconsin vs. Purdue
NCPA Indiana Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - Wisconsin vs. Purdue
NCPA Indiana Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - Wisconsin vs. Purdue

Video.summary: Dylan Frazier and Ritchie Tuazon meet Irina Tereschenko and Connor Pardoe in a high-stakes mixed doubles match at Picklebowl 2023. Set against the backdrop of this annual charity event, the match features four seasoned competitors known for their precision, quick reflexes, and court awareness. Expect fast-paced exchanges, smart teamwork, and big momentum swings as both teams battle for bragging rights and a good cause. Blending professional play with the spirited energy of Picklebowl, this match is a crowd favorite you won’t want to miss.
Video.title: Picklebowl 2023 – Mixed Doubles – Frazier & Tuazon vs Tereschenko & Pardoe

Image.alt: Picklebowl 2023 – Mixed Doubles – Frazier & Tuazon vs Tereschenko & Pardoe
Picklebowl 2023 – Mixed Doubles – Frazier & Tuazon vs Tereschenko & Pardoe
Picklebowl 2023 – Mixed Doubles – Frazier & Tuazon vs Tereschenko & Pardoe

Video.summary: This episode features courtside commentary on a ladies doubles match between the Sarasota Manatees and the GNV Chomp, followed by a men's doubles match between the same two teams. The ladies match showcases the absolute dominance of the top-seeded GNV Chomp, with players like Heather Nobler and Kelsey Laurent proving why they're a force to be reckoned with. The Sarasota Manatees, with new player Andy Godwin, fight to improve their league standing. The episode then transitions to a close men's doubles match featuring players Tobias Moreno and BK for the Chomp and Jamir and Jared Brooks for the Manatees.
Video.title: AFPL Stop 4 Championship Court - Game 4 - GNV Chomp vs. Sarasota Manatees

Image.alt: AFPL Stop 4 Championship Court - Game 4 - GNV Chomp vs. Sarasota Manatees
AFPL Stop 4 Championship Court - Game 4 - GNV Chomp vs. Sarasota Manatees
AFPL Stop 4 Championship Court - Game 4 - GNV Chomp vs. Sarasota Manatees

Video.summary: The Men’s Doubles Open Quarterfinal at the 2023 English Nationals delivers a riveting showdown as rising talents Daniel Wren and Alex Woolf take on the experienced pairing of Wesley Jackson and Bernie Audibert. Every point is a test of patience, power, and precision, with both teams refusing to back down in this critical battle for a spot in the semifinals.With crowd energy building and momentum swinging back and forth, this match captures the grit and skill that define top-tier British pickleball. Who will punch their ticket to the next round?
Video.title: English Nationals 2023 – Men’s Doubles Open Quarterfinal – Wren & Woolf vs Jackson & Audibert

Image.alt: English Nationals 2023 – Men’s Doubles Open Quarterfinal – Wren & Woolf vs Jackson & Audibert
English Nationals 2023 – Men’s Doubles Open Quarterfinal – Wren & Woolf vs Jackson & Audibert
English Nationals 2023 – Men’s Doubles Open Quarterfinal – Wren & Woolf vs Jackson & Audibert

Video.summary: In this Men’s Doubles Open Group C clash, Tom Turney and Sam Chajul take on Jamie Basford and Peter Hitchman. Watch as smart defense, aggressive drives, and well-timed net play define this intense showdown at the 2023 English Nationals. A standout match that reflects the growing depth of talent in British pickleball.
Video.title: English Nationals 2023 – Men’s Doubles Group C – Turney & Chajul vs Basford & Hitchman

Image.alt: English Nationals 2023 – Men’s Doubles Group C – Turney & Chajul vs Basford & Hitchman
English Nationals 2023 – Men’s Doubles Group C – Turney & Chajul vs Basford & Hitchman
English Nationals 2023 – Men’s Doubles Group C – Turney & Chajul vs Basford & Hitchman

Video.summary: Sheri Courter and Christine Karges take on Sarah Mitten and Mary Helen Atkins in this Women's Senior Pro Quarterfinal Match.
Video.title: US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - Women's Senior Pro Doubles - Quarterfinal

US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - Women's Senior Pro Doubles - Quarterfinal
US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - Women's Senior Pro Doubles - Quarterfinal

Video.summary: In this alternate cut of the Women’s Split Pro Doubles Quarterfinal at the 2024 US Open, Suzanne Leblang & Milan Rane face off against Martina Frantova & Christine Karges in a battle of shot placement, net pressure, and quick resets. Filmed in Naples, Florida, this matchup delivers a new perspective on one of the tournament’s most tactical and fast-paced doubles clashes.
Video.title: US Open Pickleball 2024 – Women’s Split Pro Doubles Quarterfinal – Leblang & Rane vs Frantova & Karg

Image.alt: US Open Pickleball 2024 – Women’s Split Pro Doubles Quarterfinal – Leblang & Rane vs Frantova & Karg
US Open Pickleball 2024 – Women’s Split Pro Doubles Quarterfinal – Leblang & Rane vs Frantova & Karg
US Open Pickleball 2024 – Women’s Split Pro Doubles Quarterfinal – Leblang & Rane vs Frantova & Karg

Video.summary: Experience the excitement of the Mixed Split Pro Age pickleball match on Championship Court. This video features a unique pairing of new partners Schull and Endara, who are familiar with the heat and come from a grinding three-game win in their last match. They face off against the formidable Lee Whitwell and Kafka. With Lee Whitwell's impressive hands and athleticism, and Kafka's hard-hitting forehand and topspin drives, this is a matchup you won't want to miss. Get ready for incredible rallies and a display of top-tier pickleball as these pros battle it out.
Video.title: US Open 2025 - Mixed Split Pro Age - Whitewell/Kawka vs. Schull/Endara

Image.alt: US Open 2025 - Mixed Split Pro Age - Whitewell/Kawka vs. Schull/Endara
US Open 2025 - Mixed Split Pro Age - Whitewell/Kawka vs. Schull/Endara
US Open 2025 - Mixed Split Pro Age - Whitewell/Kawka vs. Schull/Endara

Video.summary: The 2025 European Pickleball Championships in Rome, Italy, hosts the Senior Women's Doubles Final under the floodlights . Team England, represented by Kirsty Gray and Anna Linton, faces off against Team Spain's Monica Ramirez and Araceli Senciales .After a strong start where England establishes an early lead, the match tightens as Spain finds their rhythm in the second game . Witness the strategic battle as Gray utilizes precision lobs to disrupt the Spanish defense , while Linton delivers powerful drives to secure critical points . In a high-stakes contest for the gold medal, England targets their opponents' positioning to close out the championship .
Video.title: Senior Women's Doubles Final - Gray/Linton vs. Ramirez/Senciales

Image.alt: Senior Women's Doubles Final - Gray/Linton vs. Ramirez/Senciales
Senior Women's Doubles Final - Gray/Linton vs. Ramirez/Senciales
Senior Women's Doubles Final - Gray/Linton vs. Ramirez/Senciales
